sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88038" key="promi/sqwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προμίσθ-ωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n88038.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">letting beforehand,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:4:26" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.26</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
